response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified two distinct segments: a conversation segment (00:00-03:41) and a gameplay segment (03:42-04:58). 2. Observed the rhythm game interface which displayed the song title 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic' and identified it as a song by Mitchie M. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic' by Mitchie M. 4. Constructed the JSON response including the lyrics and scene timestamps.
response.global_summary: The video features a VTuber, Shiranui Flare, introducing her outfit and her intention to play the 'pop'n music' arcade rhythm game. She then proceeds to play the song 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic' by Mitchie M within the game.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare talks to the audience about her outfit and the 'pop'n music' game she is about to play. No vocal music is playing.
Shiranui Flare plays the song 'Suki! Yuki! Maji Magic' by Mitchie M in the 'pop'n music' game.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, the city is like a whipped cake, Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic!
The confetti the sky gives is a winter festival, celebrating angel wings, woo
Going out to the land of silver, go go go
The snow train runs through the city, choo choo choo
I'll show you a landscape like a picture book
So put your wishes into it, now (now) chant them (three, two, one)
ABCD, Do-Do, Shi-Shi, La-La, Shi-Shi, Magical Miracle-Kuru Pop!
Ah, the city is like a whipped cake, Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic!
The confetti the sky gives is a winter festival, celebrating angel wings
Ah, the city is like an aurora-colored, light-up city, Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic!
If I could stay a child, dream land
Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to snow miku!
I love the sharp, cold season, love love love
So that both ice and magic don't melt, hue hue hue
Can't it just stay like this forever? I still want to be excited after all

1234, Water, Metal, Earth, Fire, Wood, Magical Miracle-Kuru Pop!
Ah, I feel like a hopping rabbit, Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic!
Once I get the energy the earth gives me, I can live tomorrow just as I wish

It's fine to just pretend to be an adult

The snowscape is lyrical
The street gonna be magical

Ah, the city is like a whipped cake, Suki! Yuki! Honki Magic!
